title: crataegus boyntonii var. buckleyi
intro: Crataegus boyntonii var. buckleyi, also known as the Buckley Hawthorn, is a variety of the hawthorn plant, a flowering plant native to North America. The medicinal properties of Crataegus boyntonii var. buckleyi lie in its berries, which contain flavonoids, oligomeric proanthocyanidins, and other bioactive compounds that have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of this plant include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular function, and reducing the risk of heart disease. Crataegus boyntonii var. buckleyi can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and extracts, which can be consumed as a dietary supplement to support cardiovascular health.
